name: Advanced Digital Chips Inc.
summary: Advanced Digital Chips Inc., a fabless semiconductor company, provides intellectual property (IP) and System on Chips (SoCs) for telecommunications, multimedia, and consumer electronics applications primarily in South Korea. The company offers IP cores; and general and multimedia micro controller units. In addition, the company offers application specific integrated circuit and SoC solutions. Further, it distributes semiconductor components. Advanced Digital Chips Inc. primarily serves semiconductor design, packaging, and foundry companies. The company was formerly known as Asia Design Corporation and changed its name to Advanced Digital Chips Inc. in October 2000. Advanced Digital Chips Inc. was founded in 1996 and is based in Anyang, South Korea.
